module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string execution invocation input guidance, Plan prompt wording that names the protocol Plan directly, and step prompt examples that serialize Intent as the unit string "Intent" while placing intent detail in StepDraft.description.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates; Plan wording names the protocol Plan directly, and Initial, Plan, and ExecutionAnalysis use unit-string Intent examples with StepDraft.description for pending-intent text.
